author: Abhay Anand
name: 11L Depth Recurrence + BigramHash + EMA 0.9965
blurb: Depth recurrence (layers 4,5 repeat once for 13 virtual layers, activated at step 3000) with BigramHash(1536, 112) and EMA 0.9965. Built on PR #1334 by @aryanbhosale and PR #1421 by @X-Abhishek-X, with BigramHash added from our prior SOTA stack. SP1024 tokenizer, GPTQ int6 + Brotli.
